Class NotificationsActivity

android.app.Activity
androidx.core.app.ComponentActivity
androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
com.example.codebase.NotificationsActivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.contextaware.ContextAware, androidx.activity.FullyDrawnReporterOwner, androidx.activity.OnBackPressedDispatcherOwner, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultRegistryOwner, androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBarDrawerToggle.DelegateProvider, androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.OnRequestPermissionsResultCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.RequestPermissionsRequestCodeValidator, androidx.core.app.OnMultiWindowModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnNewIntentProvider, androidx.core.app.OnPictureInPictureModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.TaskStackBuilder.SupportParentable, androidx.core.content.OnConfigurationChangedProvider, androidx.core.content.OnTrimMemoryProvider, androidx.core.view.KeyEventDispatcher.Component, androidx.core.view.MenuHost, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class NotificationsActivity extends androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
Displays the current device's notifications and pending event invitations.

Notifications are loaded from the Firestore path notifications/<deviceId>/messages, ordered by sentAt descending, and rendered in a

invalid reference 
ListView
via NotificationListAdapter. Tapping a row navigates to EntrantEventDetailActivity for the associated event.

An invitation summary card is shown above the list when the device is present in any event's selectedEntrants list but has not yet enrolled. Tapping the card opens InvitationsActivity. The card is hidden when there are no pending invitations or if the Firestore query fails.

Both the notification list and the invitation summary are refreshed every time the activity resumes via onResume().

See Also:
  • NotificationListAdapter
  • AppNotification
  • AppDatabase

    Method
    Description
    protected void
    onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
    Initialises the activity, binds views, sets up the invitation card click listener, configures bottom navigation, and triggers the initial data loads.
    protected void
    onResume()
    Refreshes the invitation summary and notification list each time the activity returns to the foreground, ensuring data stays current after returning from InvitationsActivity or EntrantEventDetailActivity.

      protected void onResume()
      Refreshes the invitation summary and notification list each time the activity returns to the foreground, ensuring data stays current after returning from InvitationsActivity or EntrantEventDetailActivity.
